Off Calendar Apr-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipts For The Blocked Accounts
Off Calendar Mar-14-2023 Continued To Apr-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Franchesca Callejo appeared by zoom for and with Jasmine Debella by zoom.

Discussion was held regarding to the court's concern about the three bank accounts exceeding the FDIC limits, where the additional funds in excess of the sales proceeds came from, the difficulty the administrator had with various banks with respect to opening the blocked accounts, the various banks that denied the administrator's request, the beneficiaries having no issue with the funds remaining in the accounts until final distribution, how the accounts at Fremont bank are set up to maintain that the accounts are insured, the hearing date of April 11th for the petition for final distribution, whether or not there are any anticipated issues with said petition, all of the funds now being in blocked accounts except for the bonded amount, etc. Status on filing of the receipts for the blocked accounts is continued to April 11, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Tan. Not reported.

Appearances: Franchesca Callejo appeared by zoom for Jasmine Debella (administrator).
Pat Rock (listing agent) also present.

The court noted that at the last calling of this matter discussion was held regarding the conditions that are strictly needed for overbids, that the conditions need to conform to the statutes or local rules, that any deviations need to be explained and that good cause needs to be established. The court also noted that the following provision "that 24 hours before the sale any over bidder must deliver a signed disclosure package to the agent" is not consistent with the statutes or the local rules. In addition, the court informed Ms. Callejo that it does not want to see conditions that are not expressly authorized under the statute or local rules, that in the future other conditions that relate to overbids that are not in the statute/local rules must be supported by good cause and that it may cause delays. The sale was confirmed to Alex Varum agent for 259 DIV LLC at $2,310,500.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is granted, but deemed under submission subject to receipt of a proposed order. An additional bond in the amount of $80,000.00 is required. The remaining balance of the proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into blocked accounts. Status on filing of the receipts for the blocked accounts is set for October 11, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3675 24th Street, San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Sep-06-2022 Off Calendar

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3675 24th Street, San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Aug-16-2022 Continued To Sep-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Franchesca Callejo, via Zoom, for Jasmine Debella, Personal Representative; Pat Rock, via Zoom, for Corcoran Global Living, exclusive Real Estate Agent.

The court expresses its concern that apparently the Report of Sale that was filed on Jul-19-2022 had missing material allegations and the courtesy copy that was delivered to the court appears to have been altered to include those missing allegations. Ms. Callejo reports that the courtesy copies that she had Mr. Rock deliver to the court were the copies that she printed from the court's website and that she is unable to explain the discrepancy and confirms that she in no way intended to deceive the court. Mr. Rock confirms that the courtesy copies that he delivered to the court are the same document that Ms. Callejo forwarded to him via email and that he did not alter any of the documents.

After additional discussion, the matter shall be continued to Aug-30-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The court confirms that the Report of Sale will not proceed at the next hearing date but that the court will consider how it intends to address the apparent misrepresentation to the court.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

***After hearing: approximately five minutes after the hearing had concluded, the court realized that the discrepancy mentioned above may have been caused by a technical issue and Ms. Callejo is contacted via telephone to advise her that the court intends to recall the matter. Ms. Callejo makes her appearance once again via Zoom and the matter is recalled at approximately 11:30am. The court advises Ms. Callejo that the Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is being continued to Sep-06-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The court advises Ms. Callejo that for the Sale to proceed at the next hearing date, she is required to file an amended Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property and that she will be required to provide notice but not republish. The court also confirms that she will need to clear the issue regarding the overbidding procedure.
